title: ghost tales in The Darkside Indigenous ghost stories
publication_or_organisation: Indigenous ghost stories; ABC Books and Arts / Warwick Thornton
australian_relation: ABC Books and Arts public interview about Warwick Thornton's The Darkside, a collection of true ghost tales from across Australia.
evidence_summary: ABC Books and Arts described Aboriginal culture as having a rich tradition of spirit lives and discussed Warwick Thornton's The Darkside as a collection of poignant, sad, funny, and absurd true ghost tales from across Australia, performed by Australian actors as storytellers.
